--- a/pagination.py
+++ b/pagination.py
@@ -7,6 +7,6 @@
 def paginate(items, page, size=20):
-    start = (page - 1) * size
+    start = page * size
     end = start + size
     return items[start:end]
file_context:
def paginate(items, page, size=20):
    start = page * size
    end = start + size
    return items[start:end]

gold_annotations.issue: page*size skips first page (page=1 starts at item 20). Should be (page-1)*size.
